name: cn-academic-spark
description: CN-Academic-Spark is a skill package for Chinese academic paper-to-PPT workflows. It contains one skill: CN_Spark_paper2ppt, an editable Chinese academic PPT generator with an internal TechnicalRoute module for research-route and framework diagrams.

plugins.name: cn-academic-spark
plugins.description: Claude/Codex skill package for generating editable Chinese academic PPTX decks from papers, reports, proposals, and literature reviews. The repository currently ships one skill, CN_Spark_paper2ppt, with an internal TechnicalRoute workflow for research-route / framework diagrams.
